text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Osaka Hai is here. Eishin Flash looks
perfectly calm and collected.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Let's review the top competitors appearing in this
race.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
First, Fuji Kiseki. While this distance may not be
her strong suit, she will no doubt be a difficult
opponent in this race.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Next, Manhattan Cafe. She spoke of feeling fated
to win the upcoming Spring Shield and is thus
ablaze with determination to win today.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
They're my most formidable foes. Not only do
they have an affinity with the course, they also
have impressive track records.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text: Today's race could become quite ferocious.
choice_data_list: You seem to be excited for it, though.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
I must admit, my heart is pulsing with
anticipation.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
It's strange. Two months ago, all I felt for this
moment was fear.
choice_data_list: That proves you're more ready now.
That proves you're more ready now.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
After all, I have been training the correct way all
this time.

text_block_list.name: Eishin Flash
text_block_list.text:
Now I've just got to hold my head high and keep
running toward my goal!
